discrepancies.title: D-162-1 substrate-level → deposit-level closure verification
discrepancies.description: Slot 162 originated D-162-1 (umbrella v1.0 version-DOI 19885550 mislabeled as concept). Slot 163+164 corrected substrate (5 line edits across schema v1 + PCF-2 v1.4 paste-source). This slot verifies the correction was correctly propagated through Zenodo deposit form: both Umbrella supplement rows in the live v1.4 record cite 10.5281/zenodo.19885549 (concept), NOT 19885550 (v1.0). Chain substrate → deposit form → published record verified intact. D-162-1 fully closed.
